cpu_protection.name: CPU Protection
cpu_protection.description: Trigger graded interception when CPU usage exceeds threshold

memory_protection.name: Memory Protection
memory_protection.description: Trigger graded interception when memory usage exceeds threshold

temperature_protection.name: Temperature Protection
temperature_protection.description: Trigger hardware protection when system temperature exceeds threshold

disk_protection.name: Disk Protection
disk_protection.description: Trigger alert when disk usage exceeds threshold

action_on_warning.cpu: Log record, reduce non-core task priority
action_on_warning.disk: Log record, remind to clean up disk

action_on_critical.memory: Enable memory throttling, limit new task memory allocation
action_on_critical.temperature: Reduce CPU frequency, pause heavy computation

action_on_emergency.cpu: Pause heavy tasks, only keep core services
action_on_emergency.memory: Pause heavy tasks, release cache memory
action_on_emergency.temperature: Pause all heavy tasks, force cooling
action_on_emergency.disk: Force clean temporary files and caches

level_descriptions.emergency: Danger! Heavy tasks have been paused
